productDisplayName: Nike Men City Court VI White Sports Shoes
description: These supportive and lightweight nike City Court VI shoes are the ultimate pair to keep you moving on the tennis court. The cushioning in these shoes provides impact protection on a variety of court surfaces and for quick cuts and even faster changes of direction, they offer lateral protection when you're covering the court.UpperCombination upper with full-grain, synthetic leathers and mesh for lightweight support and breathabilityMidsoleFull-length Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight cushioningOutsoleGDR (durable rubber) sole in a herringbone pattern provides durability and optimal traction and a pivot point helps keep your footwork sharpshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
